info.title: Court AI Backend — Judicial Case Management API
info.description:
## AI-Powered Trusted Judicial Case Management & Prioritization System

This API powers the backend of an enterprise judicial case management platform
with AI-driven prioritization, role-based access control, audit trails,
and document management.

### Authentication
Use the **Authorize** button to provide your JWT Bearer token.
Enter only the raw JWT value (do not add `Bearer ` prefix).

### Roles
- `ROLE_ADMIN` — Full system access
- `ROLE_JUDGE` — Case management and verdicts
- `ROLE_CLERK` — Case filing and document management
- `ROLE_ADVOCATE` — Case viewing and submissions

put.summary: Update my privacy and notification settings

get.description: Returns full role details including all assigned permissions.

put.description: Updates display name and description of a role. System roles can be relabelled but not deleted.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a role. System roles (ADMIN, JUDGE, CLERK, ADVOCATE) cannot be deleted.

put.description: Updates an unsigned judicial order. Signed orders are immutable.
Marks the hearing as COMPLETED. Records actual end time.
Sets hearing status to ADJOURNED and records the reason and next date. Updates case status to ADJOURNED.
Reserves judgment on a case. Valid from: JUDGE_ASSIGNED, HEARING_SCHEDULED, IN_PROGRESS, ADJOURNED. Sets status to JUDGEMENT_RESERVED. Notifies advocates and clerk.
Reopens a disposed case — only allowed under specific business conditions (e.g., higher-court remand). Sets status back to IN_PROGRESS.
Disposes (closes) a case after judgment. Valid from: JUDGEMENT_RESERVED. Sets status to DISPOSED. Notifies all parties.

put.summary: Replace a document with a new version
put.description: Archives the current version and replaces the document. Only permitted before verification.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the document. Only permitted before court verification.

put.description: Clerk or admin marks the document as VERIFIED. Notifies the uploading advocate.
Requests the advocate to replace the document. Status → REPLACEMENT_REQUESTED. Notifies advocate.
Clerk or admin rejects the document. Status → REJECTED. Advocate is notified.

put.summary: Return case to advocate with remarks → RETURNED
Officially register a case → REGISTERED + generates official case number
Open a SUBMITTED case for scrutiny → UNDER_SCRUTINY
Verify or reject an evidence item

get.summary: Get full case details by UUID

put.summary: Update a case (advocates: DRAFT only; admins: any editable status)

put.description: Validates the requested transition against the state machine, records history, and triggers timeline + audit events.

put.summary: Submit a DRAFT case for court scrutiny
Transfer a case to a different judge
Transfer a case to a different court
Transfer a case to a different clerk
Archive a DISPOSED or CLOSED case (read-only after archival)
Assign a new role to a user

delete.description: Cannot delete an active window. Cancel it first.

put.summary: Mark a maintenance window as completed
Transfer a judge from one case to another
put.description: Replaces the current judge assignment on a case. Validates open status.

put.summary: Transfer a clerk to a different court

put.description: Sets isActive=true and assigns startDate=today if not already set.

put.summary: Enable or disable XAI (Explainable AI) factor reporting

post.description: Creates a new user. Requires ADMIN role.

get.description: Returns a summary list of all non-deleted roles. Requires MANAGE_USERS.

post.description: Creates a new non-system role. Requires SYSTEM_CONFIGURATION.

get.summary: Get permissions for a role by UUID
get.description: Returns only the permission summaries assigned to the role.

post.summary: Assign a permission to a role
post.description: Idempotent — assigning an already-present permission is a no-op. Requires SYSTEM_CONFIGURATION.

get.description: Returns all hearings across all cases assigned to the current judge.

post.description: Schedules a new hearing for a case assigned to the judge. Validates: case not disposed, no time-room conflicts.
Uploads an interim order, final order, or judgment for a case. Metadata only — binary file uploaded directly to storage.

get.summary: List my notes for a case
get.description: Returns all private notes authored by the current judge on this case.

post.description: Creates a private judicial note on a case. Only the owning judge can read it.

post.summary: Upload a document to a case
post.description: Uploads and validates a file, generates SHA-256/MD5 checksums, stores metadata, and queues for OCR if applicable.
Restores the specified version as the current document. Archives the current version first.
Resets a FAILED OCR job to PENDING for re-processing. Limited by maxRetries.
Creates an OCR job for the document and queues it for text extraction. Idempotent.

get.summary: List all objections for a case

post.summary: Raise an objection on a case
Run duplicate detection for a case
Create a new case in DRAFT status
Clone a DRAFT/SUBMITTED case (copies basic details, NOT documents/evidence/hearings)
Assign a judge to the case
Assign a clerk for case scrutiny
Assign the case to a specific bench

post.description: Multi-dimensional case search with optional filters for status, priority, court, judge, advocate, party names, date range, keyword, and AI score. All fields optional. Supports pagination and sorting.

post.summary: Verify email address using the verification token
Send OTP to the registered mobile number
Reset password using the reset token
Rotate refresh token and receive new token pair
Invalidate current session and revoke all tokens
Authenticate user and receive JWT token pair
Upload a document for a case
Initiate a password reset for a user

post.description: Validates end > start. Prevents overlapping SCHEDULED/ACTIVE windows.

post.summary: Assign a judge to a case
post.description: Admin assigns or re-assigns a judge to an open case. Validates case is not disposed or closed.
Validates unique court code. Admin only.
Validates unique config key. Prevents duplicate keys.

post.summary: Assign a clerk to a court

post.description: Validates unique title. Announcement starts inactive by default.

get.description: Returns aggregate counts (assigned cases, today's hearings, pending judgments, etc.) and shortlists.
Returns all cases assigned to the current judge, paginated.
Returns the full detail of a case assigned to the current judge.
Returns all evidence items for a case assigned to the current judge.
Returns all documents attached to a case assigned to the current judge.
Returns metadata for a specific document. No binary content exposed.

get.summary: Get AI analysis for a case
get.description: Returns urgency score, delay impact, priority score, trust score, confidence score, AI recommendation, and explainable AI (XAI) factors. Read-only.

get.summary: List all versions of a document
get.description: Returns the complete version history in descending order.

get.summary: Get verification history for a document
get.description: Returns all verification actions (verify/reject/replacement-request) in descending order.
Returns the file inline for browser preview (PDF, images).
Returns current OCR processing status and extracted text if available.
Returns the file as an attachment. Increments download counter.
Multi-dimensional search: filter by case, type, status, OCR status, uploader, date range, keyword, MIME type, or file extension. All filters are optional.

get.summary: Get document checksum and duplicate flag
get.description: Returns SHA-256, MD5, duplicate detection result, and generation timestamp.
Returns summary statistics for the current user's role.

get.summary: List cases with optional status filter
Get status transition timeline for a case
List all evidence for a case
List all documents for a case
Get the current workflow state and allowed transitions
Get the complete ordered timeline of a case
get.description: Returns all lifecycle events from creation to current state, ordered oldest → newest.

get.summary: Get full status history of a case
get.description: Returns every status transition from creation to present, newest first.

get.summary: Get judge assignment history of a case
Get statistics for the authenticated judge's assigned cases
Get case statistics for a specific court
Get statistics for the authenticated advocate's cases
List all hearings for my cases

delete.summary: Delete a document (only before court verification)

get.summary: View AI analysis for a case (read-only)
Get full user profile by UUID

get.description: Returns active sessions, failed logins today, account locks today, and suspicious logins today.
Verifies admin endpoint access. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

get.summary: Get workload for a specific judge

get.description: Returns assigned case counts, active cases, disposed cases, and reserved judgments for every judge.
Returns all system statistics: users, courts, cases, hearings, AI status, security summary, and recent pending users.
Filter by action, actorUuid, entityType, and/or outcome. Paginated.

get.summary: Get audit log detail by UUID
Export audit logs by date range
get.description: Returns all audit logs between 'from' and 'to' timestamps. Format: yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss
Returns AI_ENABLED, model version, priority/confidence thresholds, and explainability flag.

delete.summary: Remove a permission from a role
delete.description: Removes the permission immediately. All users with this role lose the permission on next token refresh.
Marks the session as REVOKED, forcing re-login.

delete.summary: Revoke all sessions for a user
delete.description: Forces the user to re-login from all devices.

bearerAuth.description: Paste raw JWT token only. Swagger will add the Bearer prefix automatically.
bearerAuth.name: bearerAuth
